chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-1052 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.11026/2017 08-04-2019 Ms. Amber Iqbal Advocate, associate of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano Advocate for the applicant Mr. Shakeel Ahmed Kalwar, Advocate for the proposed accused No.1 to 3 Mr. Ali Ahmed Khan Advocate for proposed accused No.4 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Addl. P.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length, does not press this application and states that as per the impugned order dated 24.10.2017 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge (Hudood) Sukkur, the applicant shall avail the remedy of filing direct complaint against the proposed accused. Accordingly, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the applicant is at liberty to avail the remedy of filing direct complaint if so advised and permissible under the law. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
